curation.synopsis: Perdition was once a cemetery world; under Word Bearer occupation it has become a chain of mines where its surviving people are forced to break and defile the relics of the Imperial dead. Primaris Lieutenant Turan Raakis leads a Raven Guard Vanguard team into Perdition's wastes to wage the kind of patient, lightless war his primarch would recognise: sabotage, ambush, and the slow forging of a rebellion out of the world's broken inhabitants. To free Perdition, Raakis must convince mortals who have nothing left to gamble what little remains — and live up to a legacy that demands every shadow be made into a weapon.

flags.reason: Goodreads page records only 1 rating (1.00, 0 reviews) — too thin to aggregate; publication status disputed in third-party reporting (some sources describe the title as never released by Black Library).
